params.name: Ark of Covenant
params.source: Fragment Crafting (15.1%), Lottery Machine (0.81%), Relic Forge (90 Relic RF), Wishing (0.53%)
params.description:
On Mar 4, 586 BC, this relic of ancient Hebrew appeared in history for the last time.

Babylon invaded and burned King Solomon's temple imprisoning the Hebrews. Treasures from King Solomon's temple were brought to the treasure room of the king of Babylon. However, when the loot was sorted, the Ark of the Covenant was missing. Legendarily, it is a golden vessel holding the tablets of the Ten Commandments that God gave to Moses on Mount Sinai. And the temple was at first built to preserve the Ark  …
